description: App Store install and delete activity (Standard report). Ref: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/analytics-reports/app-installs

date.description: Date on which the event occurred. For weekly/monthly instances, the first day of that week/month

app_name.description: Name of the app provided during setup in App Store Connect

event.description: Type of install/delete event. Values: Install, Delete, First Time Download, Re-download, Update, Restore from iCloud Backup, Managed Download, In-App Event

source_type.description: Where the user discovered your app. Values: App Store Browse, App Store Search, App Referrer, Web Referrer, App Store Sheets, Unavailable, Null

territory.description: App Store country or region where the installation or deletion occurred (ISO country code)

device.description: Device type on which the event occurred: iPhone, iPad, Desktop, Apple TV, Apple Vision

platform_version.description: OS version of the device on which the app was installed or deleted

count.description: Total count of events from users who opted to share data with Apple and developers

unique_devices.description: Number of unique devices on which events were generated from opted-in users

synced_at.description: Timestamp when Airbyte synced this record (metadata)
